category_sources: source_facts.description says create Chinese calendars; official ccal page says it writes a Gregorian calendar together with Chinese calendar to standard output and supports HTML, XML, EPS, simplified, and traditional Chinese output.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ccal; official page heading uses CCAL-2.5.3 and describes the ccal utility.
docs_sources: Official ccal page is the main documentation surface and links a pre-formatted manual page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ccal page distributes source tarballs but does not identify an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chinese calendar creation; official ccal page describes Gregorian plus Chinese calendar output, EPS/HTML/XML formats, and simplified/traditional Chinese support.
